attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-MH-01-00244) derived from source note CIA-044 - maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-MH-01 bucket at ingest --reseq.
Age not stated in the source note - inferred as adult (45) purely to satisfy the required demographics.age field; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex not stated in the source note - inferred as male to satisfy the required demographics.sex_at_birth field; please confirm on clinician review.
Geographic context not stated (private residence, after-hours MBS 585-600 context) - geographic_context omitted rather than guessed.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the in-person neurological examination, mental state examination and clinician-measured vitals were reprojected - sealed into 10/11 with telehealth_limits, and the presentation layer de-anchored to a pre-diagnosis patient account (patient-observable appearance/self-treatment tagged in 01.objective_data_offered).

Prescribing reprojection: the source clinician prescribed Temazepam 10 mg for 3 nights; captured in 12.medications with the source dose but flagged as a prescriber-supervised option (requires_prescription:true, necessity acceptable_alternative) - the telehealth AI Doctor refers to a prescriber and does not direct a dose itself. No dose was synthesised beyond the source.
AMT candidate code for temazepam is a SNOMED substance identifier used as a placeholder pending an authoritative AMT/PBS terminology receipt - unverified.

Baseline tier set to T2 (prompt GP; drug-of-dependence consideration + distressed patient living alone) with minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1 and an explicit over-triage warning - this is a calibration case where behavioural-first self-care plus a mood/mania and self-harm screen and safety-netting is the correct, passing answer.

Source 'Urgency Justification' framing (urgent after-hours MBS assessment) reflects an in-person billing context and was NOT used to set acuity; the true clinical acuity per the note (normal neuro exam and MSE, no psychosis/mania, no suicidal ideation) is low - sealed rationale in 13.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
